data.body:
[Maintenance Notice]

We're currently under our 9/6 (Tue) temporary maintenance, Sensei.
The game is unavailable while under maintenance.

Maintenance Period: 9/6 (Tue) 09:15 AM – 10:15 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/100863

※Maintenance times may change based on conditions.

[Maintenance Notice 2]

We're currently under our 9/6 (Tue) temporary maintenance, Sensei.
The game is unavailable while under maintenance.

Maintenance Period: 9/6 (Tue) 11:15 – 15:15 (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/100874

※Maintenance times may change based on conditions.

9/6 (Tue) temporary  maintenance has ended at 14:00 (UTC)
We'd like to express our sincere apology again for the inconvenience caused due to the Equipment enhancement error and extended maintenance.
Please check following notice for the further details.
https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/100874
